controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (commercial paper and non-convertible debentures of original or initial maturity upto one year)
controls.control_description:
(a) These Directions shall be called the Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India
(Commercial Paper and Non-Convertible Debentures of original or initial
maturity upto one year) Directions, 2024.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (commercial paper and non-convertible debentures of original or initial maturity upto one year)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all persons/agencies dealing in commercial paper and/or non-convertible debentures of original or initial maturity upto one year
controls.control_description:
(b) These Directions shall be applicable to all persons/agencies dealing in
Commercial Paper and/or Non-Convertible Debentures of original or initial
maturity upto one year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all persons/agencies dealing in commercial paper and/or non-convertible debentures of original or initial maturity upto one year

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with effect from april 01, 2024
controls.control_description: (c) These Directions shall come into force with effect from April 01, 2024.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with effect from april 01, 2024

controls.control_objective: To ensure include: (a) export import bank of india, (b) national bank for agriculture and rural development, (c) national housing bank, (d) small industries dev
controls.control_description:
(i) All India Financial Institution (AIFI) shall include: (a) Export Import Bank
of India, (b) National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development, (c)
National Housing Bank, (d) Small Industries Development Bank of India
and (e) National Bank for Financing Infrastructure and Development.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include: (a) export import bank of india, (b) national bank for agriculture and rural development, (c) national housing bank, (d) small industries dev

controls.control_objective: To ensure a banking company (including a payment bank and a small finance bank) as defined in clause (c) of section 5 of the banking regulation act, 1949 (10 of
controls.control_description:
(ii) Bank means a banking company (including a Payment Bank and a Small
Finance Bank) as defined in clause (c) of Section 5 of the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949 (10 of 1949) or a "regional rural bank", a
"corresponding new bank" or "State Bank of India" as defined in clauses
(ja), (da) and (nc), of section 5 respectively thereof, or a "cooperative bank"
as defined in clause (cci) of Section 5 read with Section 56 of the said Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a banking company (including a payment bank and a small finance bank) as defined in clause (c) of section 5 of the banking regulation act, 1949 (10 of

controls.control_objective: To ensure any entity incorporated by or under any statute for the time being in force but does not include a co-operative society registered under any law relat
controls.control_description:
(iii) Body corporate means any entity incorporated by or under any Statute
for the time being in force but does not include a co-operative society
registered under any law relating to co-operative societies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any entity incorporated by or under any statute for the time being in force but does not include a co-operative society registered under any law relat

controls.control_objective: To ensure an unsecured money market instrument issued in the form of a promissory note
controls.control_description:
(iv) Commercial Paper (CP) means an unsecured money market
instrument issued in the form of a promissory note.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an unsecured money market instrument issued in the form of a promissory note

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company as defined in section 2 (20) of the companies act, 2013 (18 of 2013)
controls.control_description:
(v) Company means a company as defined in Section 2 (20) of the
Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company as defined in section 2 (20) of the companies act, 2013 (18 of 2013)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning as assigned to it under clause (cciia) of section 5 of the banking regulation act, 1949 read with section 56 of the said act
controls.control_description:
(vi) Co-operative society shall have the meaning as assigned to it under
clause (cciia) of Section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 read with
Section 56 of the said Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning as assigned to it under clause (cciia) of section 5 of the banking regulation act, 1949 read with section 56 of the said act

controls.control_objective: To ensure a settlement mechanism which stipulates that transfer of funds from the buyer of securities is made simultaneously with the transfer of securities by
controls.control_description:
(vii) Delivery versus Payment (DvP) means a settlement mechanism which
stipulates that transfer of funds from the buyer of securities is made
simultaneously with the transfer of securities by the seller of securities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a settlement mechanism which stipulates that transfer of funds from the buyer of securities is made simultaneously with the transfer of securities by

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning as assigned in section 2 (e) of the depositories act, 1996 (22 of 1996)
controls.control_description:
(viii) Depository shall have the meaning as assigned in Section 2 (e) of the
Depositories Act, 1996 (22 of 1996).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning as assigned in section 2 (e) of the depositories act, 1996 (22 of 1996)

controls.control_objective: To ensure an entity registered with sebi as debenture trustee under the sebi (debenture trustees) regulations, 1993
controls.control_description:
(ix) Debenture Trustee means an entity registered with SEBI as debenture
trustee under the SEBI (Debenture Trustees) Regulations, 1993.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an entity registered with sebi as debenture trustee under the sebi (debenture trustees) regulations, 1993

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning as assigned in paragraph 2(1) (iii) of the electronic trading platforms (reserve bank) directions, 2018 dated october 05, 2018 or as
controls.control_description:
(x) Electronic Trading Platform (ETP) shall have the meaning as
assigned in paragraph 2(1) (iii) of the Electronic Trading Platforms
(Reserve Bank) Directions, 2018 dated October 05, 2018 or as modified
from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning as assigned in paragraph 2(1) (iii) of the electronic trading platforms (reserve bank) directions, 2018 dated october 05, 2018 or as

controls.control_objective: To ensure a person who controls the creation, operation and administration of financial benchmark(s) authorized under the reserve bank of india (financial bench
controls.control_description:
(xi) Financial Benchmark Administrator (FBA) means a person who
controls the creation, operation and administration of financial
benchmark(s) authorized under the Reserve Bank of India (Financial
Benchmark Administrators) Directions, 2023, dated December 28, 2023,
as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a person who controls the creation, operation and administration of financial benchmark(s) authorized under the reserve bank of india (financial bench

controls.control_objective: To ensure an arrangement involving two or more entities related to each other through any of the following relationships: (a) subsidiary - parent (defined in te
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an arrangement involving two or more entities related to each other through any of the following relationships: (a) subsidiary - parent (defined in te

controls.control_objective: To ensure a business trust as defined in sub-clause (i) of clause 13a of section 2 of the income-tax act, 1961
controls.control_description:
(xiii) Infrastructure Investment Trust (InvIT) means a business trust as
defined in sub-clause (i) of clause 13A of section 2 of the Income-tax Act,
1961.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a business trust as defined in sub-clause (i) of clause 13a of section 2 of the income-tax act, 1961

controls.control_objective: To ensure a scheduled commercial bank undertaking duties and responsibilities specified under paragraph 7(a) of these directions
controls.control_description:
(xiv) Issuing and Paying Agent (IPA) means a Scheduled Commercial Bank
undertaking duties and responsibilities specified under paragraph 7(a)
of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a scheduled commercial bank undertaking duties and responsibilities specified under paragraph 7(a) of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning as assigned in section 2(n) of the limited liability partnership act, 2008 (6 of 2009)
controls.control_description:
(xv) Limited liability partnership shall have the meaning as assigned in
Section 2(n) of the Limited Liability Partnership Act, 2008 (6 of 2009).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning as assigned in section 2(n) of the limited liability partnership act, 2008 (6 of 2009)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning as assigned in section 45(u) (b) of the reserve bank of india act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(xvi) Money market instruments shall have the meaning as assigned in
Section 45(U) (b) of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning as assigned in section 45(u) (b) of the reserve bank of india act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company as defined in section 45 i (f) of the reserve bank of india act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(xvii) Non-Banking Financial Company (NBFC) means a company as
defined in Section 45 I (f) of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company as defined in section 45 i (f) of the reserve bank of india act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure a secured money market instrument with an original or initial maturity upto one year
controls.control_description:
(xviii) Non-Convertible Debenture (NCD) means a secured money market
instrument with an original or initial maturity upto one year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a secured money market instrument with an original or initial maturity upto one year

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a 'person resident outside india' and shall have the meaning as assigned to it in section 2 (w) of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (42 of 1
controls.control_description:
(xix) A Non-resident shall mean a 'person resident outside India' and shall
have the meaning as assigned to it in section 2 (w) of Foreign Exchange
Management Act, 1999 (42 of 1999).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a 'person resident outside india' and shall have the meaning as assigned to it in section 2 (w) of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (42 of 1

controls.control_objective: To ensure include those undertaken on electronic trading platforms (etps)
controls.control_description:
(xx) Over-the-Counter (OTC) markets refers to markets where transactions
are undertaken in any manner other than on recognised stock
exchanges and shall include those undertaken on electronic trading
platforms (ETPs).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include those undertaken on electronic trading platforms (etps)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning as assigned in section 2(69) of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(xxi) A Promoter shall have the meaning as assigned in Section 2(69) of the
Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning as assigned in section 2(69) of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure a business trust as defined in sub-clause (ii) of clause 13a of section 2 of the income-tax act, 1961
controls.control_description:
(xxii) Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) means a business trust as
defined in sub-clause (ii) of clause 13A of section 2 of the Income-tax Act,
1961.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a business trust as defined in sub-clause (ii) of clause 13a of section 2 of the income-tax act, 1961

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning as assigned in section 2 (f) of the securities contracts regulation act, 1956 (42 of 1956)
controls.control_description:
(xxiii) Recognised stock exchanges shall have the meaning as assigned in
Section 2 (f) of the Securities Contracts Regulation Act, 1956 (42 of
1956).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning as assigned in section 2 (f) of the securities contracts regulation act, 1956 (42 of 1956)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it under indian accounting standard (ind as) 24 - related party disclosures or international accounting standard
controls.control_description:
(xxiv) Related parties shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under
Indian Accounting Standard (Ind AS) 24 - Related Party Disclosures or
International Accounting Standard (IAS) 24 - Related Party Disclosures
or any other equivalent accounting standards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it under indian accounting standard (ind as) 24 - related party disclosures or international accounting standard

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a 'person resident in india' and shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2 (v) of the foreign exchange management act, 1999 (42
controls.control_description:
(xxv) Resident shall mean a 'Person resident in India' and shall have the
same meaning as assigned to it in Section 2 (v) of the Foreign Exchange
Management Act, 1999 (42 of 1999).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a 'person resident in india' and shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2 (v) of the foreign exchange management act, 1999 (42

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning assigned to them in the reserve bank of india act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(b) Words and expressions used but not defined in these Directions shall have the
meaning assigned to them in the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning assigned to them in the reserve bank of india act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued by the following entities subject to the condition that all fund-based facilities availed
controls.control_description:
(a) CPs and NCDs may be issued by the following entities subject to the condition
that all fund-based facilities availed, if any, by the issuer from banks/ AIFIs /
NBFCs are classified as Standard at the time of issue:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued by the following entities subject to the condition that all fund-based facilities availed

controls.control_objective: To ensure the body corporate is statutorily permitted to incur debt or issue debt instruments in india
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the body corporate is statutorily permitted to incur debt or issue debt instruments in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure also issue cps under these directions
controls.control_description:
(b) Co-operative societies and limited liability partnerships with a minimum net-
worth of ₹100 crore, may also issue CPs under these Directions, subject to the
condition that all fund-based facilities availed, if any, by the issuer from banks/
AIFIs / NBFCs are classified as Standard at the time of issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also issue cps under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure no person, resident or non-resident, can invest in cps and ncds issued by related parties either in the primary or through the secondary market
controls.control_description:
Provided that no person, resident or non-resident, can invest in CPs and NCDs
issued by related parties either in the primary or through the secondary market.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to no person, resident or non-resident, can invest in cps and ncds issued by related parties either in the primary or through the secondary market

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued in dematerialised form and held with a depository registered with sebi
controls.control_description:
(i) CPs and NCDs shall be issued in dematerialised form and held with a
depository registered with SEBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued in dematerialised form and held with a depository registered with sebi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued in minimum denomination of ₹5 lakh and in multiples of ₹5 lakh thereafter
controls.control_description:
(ii) CPs and NCDs shall be issued in minimum denomination of ₹5 lakh and
in multiples of ₹5 lakh thereafter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued in minimum denomination of ₹5 lakh and in multiples of ₹5 lakh thereafter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than seven days or more than one year
controls.control_description:
(iii) The tenor of a CP shall not be less than seven days or more than one
year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than seven days or more than one year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than ninety days or more than one year
controls.control_description:
The tenor of an NCD shall not be less than ninety days or more
than one year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than ninety days or more than one year

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at the minimum, include disclosures as given in annex i
controls.control_description:
(vi) The offer documents for the issue of CPs and NCDs shall, at the
minimum, include disclosures as given in Annex I.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at the minimum, include disclosures as given in annex i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be settled within a period not exceeding t+4 working days
controls.control_description:
(vii) The primary issuances of CPs and NCDs, including both payment of
funds to the issuer and issue of CPs and NCDs to the investors, shall be
settled within a period not exceeding T+4 working days, where T
represents the deal date, i.e., the date on which the trade details,
including price/rate are agreed by the issuer and the investor(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be settled within a period not exceeding t+4 working days

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 25 per cent of the total amount issued
controls.control_description:
(viii) Total subscription by all individuals, including Hindu Undivided Families,
in any primary issuance of CPs or NCDs shall not exceed 25 per cent of
the total amount issued.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 25 per cent of the total amount issued

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued at a discount to the face value
controls.control_description: (i) CPs shall be issued at a discount to the face value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued at a discount to the face value

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued at a discount to the face value or with fixed or floating rate coupon
controls.control_description:
(ii) NCDs shall be issued at a discount to the face value or with fixed or
floating rate coupon.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued at a discount to the face value or with fixed or floating rate coupon

controls.control_objective: To ensure be linked to a benchmark published by a financial benchmark administrator or approved by the fixed income money market and derivatives association of
controls.control_description:
(iii) The coupon on floating rate NCDs shall be linked to a benchmark
published by a Financial Benchmark Administrator or approved by the
Fixed Income Money Market and Derivatives Association of India
(FIMMDA) for this purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be linked to a benchmark published by a financial benchmark administrator or approved by the fixed income money market and derivatives association of

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that any floating rate approved by them for this purpose is determined transparently, objectively and in arms' length transactions
controls.control_description:
FIMMDA shall ensure that any floating rate
approved by them for this purpose is determined transparently,
objectively and in arms' length transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that any floating rate approved by them for this purpose is determined transparently, objectively and in arms' length transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure , based on their commercial judgement and subject to prudential guidelines issued by department of regulation, rbi, choose to provide stand-by assista
controls.control_description:
(i) Banks and AIFIs may, based on their commercial judgement and subject
to prudential guidelines issued by Department of Regulation, RBI,
choose to provide stand-by assistance/credit, back-stop facility, etc., by
way of credit enhancement for a CP/NCD issue.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , based on their commercial judgement and subject to prudential guidelines issued by department of regulation, rbi, choose to provide stand-by assista

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide unconditional and irrevocable guarantee for credit enhancement of cps and ncds issued by a group entity subject to making appropriate disclosu
controls.control_description:
(ii) Non-bank entities (including corporates) may provide unconditional and
irrevocable guarantee for credit enhancement of CPs and NCDs issued
by a group entity subject to making appropriate disclosures as set out in
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide unconditional and irrevocable guarantee for credit enhancement of cps and ncds issued by a group entity subject to making appropriate disclosu

controls.control_objective: To ensure ordinarily be used to finance current assets and operating expenses
controls.control_description:
(i) Funds raised through CPs and NCDs shall ordinarily be used to finance
current assets and operating expenses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ordinarily be used to finance current assets and operating expenses

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disclosed in the offer document
controls.control_description:
The end-use of the funds raised
through a CP or an NCD shall be disclosed in the offer document.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disclosed in the offer document

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disclosed in the offer document
controls.control_description:
(ii) Where funds raised are used for purposes other than financing current
assets and operating expenses, the exact/ specific end-use shall be
disclosed in the offer document.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disclosed in the offer document

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a certificate from the chief executive officer/chief financial officer (ceo/cfo) to the ipas concerned that the proceeds of cps and ncds have b
controls.control_description:
(iii) The issuer shall submit a certificate from the Chief Executive
Officer/Chief Financial Officer (CEO/CFO) to the IPAs concerned that
the proceeds of CPs and NCDs have been used for the disclosed
purposes and that all other provisions of these Directions and conditions
of the offer document have been adhered to.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a certificate from the chief executive officer/chief financial officer (ceo/cfo) to the ipas concerned that the proceeds of cps and ncds have b

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided to the ipa within 3 months of the issue of cp/ncd or on maturity of the issue, whichever is earlier
controls.control_description:
The certificate shall be
provided to the IPA within 3 months of the issue of CP/NCD or on
maturity of the issue, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided to the ipa within 3 months of the issue of cp/ncd or on maturity of the issue, whichever is earlier

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 'a3' as per rating symbol and definition prescribed by sebi
controls.control_description:
(e) Rating Requirement
The minimum credit rating, assigned by a Credit Rating Agency (CRA), for the
issuance of CPs and NCDs shall be 'A3' as per rating symbol and definition
prescribed by SEBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 'a3' as per rating symbol and definition prescribed by sebi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be appointed for each issuance of a cp and an ncd
controls.control_description: (i) An IPA shall be appointed for each issuance of a CP and an NCD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be appointed for each issuance of a cp and an ncd

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be appointed for each issuance of an ncd
controls.control_description:
A
Debenture Trustee shall also be appointed for each issuance of an NCD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be appointed for each issuance of an ncd

controls.control_objective: To ensure be routed through the ipa
controls.control_description:
(ii) The subscription to the primary issue of a CP/NCD shall be routed
through the IPA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be routed through the ipa

controls.control_objective: To ensure be within such limits as may be approved by the board of directors or its equivalent body
controls.control_description:
(iii) The aggregate amount of CPs and NCDs which can be issued by an
issuer shall be within such limits as may be approved by the Board of
Directors or its equivalent body.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be within such limits as may be approved by the board of directors or its equivalent body

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be subject to the limits
controls.control_description:
The aggregate amount which can be
issued by an issuer regulated by a financial sector regulator shall also be
subject to the limits, if any, specified by the regulator concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be subject to the limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be traded either in otc markets, including on etps, or on recognised stock exchanges, approved by the reserve bank for the purpose
controls.control_description:
(i) CPs and NCDs shall be traded either in OTC markets, including on ETPs,
or on recognised stock exchanges, approved by the Reserve Bank for the
purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be traded either in otc markets, including on etps, or on recognised stock exchanges, approved by the reserve bank for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure be either t+0 or t+1
controls.control_description:
(ii) The settlement cycle for OTC trades in CPs and NCDs shall be either
T+0 or T+1.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be either t+0 or t+1

controls.control_objective: To ensure be settled on a dvp basis through the clearing corporation of any recognised stock exchange, or any other mechanism approved by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(iii) All OTC secondary market transactions in CPs (including transactions
undertaken on ETPs) shall be settled on a DvP basis through the clearing
corporation of any recognised stock exchange, or any other mechanism
approved by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be settled on a dvp basis through the clearing corporation of any recognised stock exchange, or any other mechanism approved by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be settled bilaterally, or on a dvp basis through the clearing corporation of any recognised stock exchange, or any other mechanism approved by the re
controls.control_description:
(iv) All OTC secondary market transactions in NCDs (including transactions
undertaken on ETPs) shall be settled bilaterally, or on a DvP basis
through the clearing corporation of any recognised stock exchange, or
any other mechanism approved by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be settled bilaterally, or on a dvp basis through the clearing corporation of any recognised stock exchange, or any other mechanism approved by the re

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following conditions:
controls.control_description: Such buybacks shall be subject to the following conditions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following conditions:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be extended to all investors in a particular issue on identical terms and conditions
controls.control_description:
(ii) The buyback offer shall be extended to all investors in a particular issue
on identical terms and conditions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be extended to all investors in a particular issue on identical terms and conditions

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to accept or reject the buyback offer
controls.control_description:
The investors shall have the option to
accept or reject the buyback offer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to accept or reject the buyback offer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be at the prevailing market price
controls.control_description: (iii) Buyback of CPs and NCDs shall be at the prevailing market price.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be at the prevailing market price

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform the details of the buyback to the ipa on the date of buyback
controls.control_description:
(iv) The issuer of a CP/NCD shall inform the details of the buyback to the IPA
on the date of buyback.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform the details of the buyback to the ipa on the date of buyback

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be informed to the debenture trustee
controls.control_description:
In the case of NCDs, the details shall also be
informed to the Debenture Trustee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be informed to the debenture trustee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be routed through the ipa
controls.control_description:
(v) The payment for the buyback of the CP/NCD by the issuer shall be routed
through the IPA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be routed through the ipa

controls.control_objective: To ensure be extinguished on the date of buyback
controls.control_description:
(vi) CPs and NCDs bought back, partially or in full, shall be extinguished on
the date of buyback.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be extinguished on the date of buyback

controls.control_objective: To ensure make the funds for redemption available to the ipa by 3:00 p
controls.control_description:
(ii) The issuer shall make the funds for redemption available to the IPA by
3:00 P.M.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make the funds for redemption available to the ipa by 3:00 p

controls.control_objective: To ensure be routed through the ipa
controls.control_description:
(iii) The repayment of a CP/NCD, including coupon payments, shall be routed
through the IPA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be routed through the ipa

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform the details of any default in payments related to a cp/ncd to the ipa before 5:00 pm on the date of the default
controls.control_description:
(i) The issuer who has defaulted on the repayment of a coupon/redemption,
partially or in full, of a CP and/or NCD shall inform the details of any
default in payments related to a CP/NCD to the IPA before 5:00 pm on
the date of the default.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform the details of any default in payments related to a cp/ncd to the ipa before 5:00 pm on the date of the default

controls.control_objective: To ensure be publicly disseminated (e
controls.control_description:
(ii) Information about any default in payments related a CP/NCD shall be
publicly disseminated (e.g., through its website) by the issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be publicly disseminated (e

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be publicly disseminated on the f-trac trade repository platform of clearing corporation of india ltd ('f-trac platform') as specified under para
controls.control_description:
Default
details shall also be publicly disseminated on the F-TRAC Trade
Repository Platform of Clearing Corporation of India Ltd ('F-TRAC
platform') as specified under Para 6(d) of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be publicly disseminated on the f-trac trade repository platform of clearing corporation of india ltd ('f-trac platform') as specified under para

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to investors of the cp/ncd in proportion to the investment made in the cp /ncd
controls.control_description:
Partial repayments, if any, of a CP/NCD shall be
distributed to investors of the CP/NCD in proportion to the investment
made in the CP /NCD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to investors of the cp/ncd in proportion to the investment made in the cp /ncd

controls.control_objective: To ensure be informed to the ipa and the debenture trustee by the issuer on the date of the repayment
controls.control_description:
(iv) Details of the repayment of the obligations related to defaulted CPs/NCDs
shall be informed to the IPA and the Debenture Trustee by the issuer on
the date of the repayment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be informed to the ipa and the debenture trustee by the issuer on the date of the repayment

controls.control_objective: To ensure stand extinguished on the date of its conversion
controls.control_description:
(v) In the event of a CP/NCD, being converted into another financial
instrument after default, as part of any bilateral / multilateral agreement
or restructuring scheme, the CP/NCD shall stand extinguished on the
date of its conversion.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to stand extinguished on the date of its conversion

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to issue cps or ncds till full repayment of the defaulted obligation or six months after the date of default, whichever is earlier
controls.control_description:
(vi) In the event of default of a CP / NCD, the issuer shall not be allowed to
issue CPs or NCDs till full repayment of the defaulted obligation or six
months after the date of default, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to issue cps or ncds till full repayment of the defaulted obligation or six months after the date of default, whichever is earlier

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported by the issuer to the ipa and the debenture trustee
controls.control_description:
(vii) Any event of conversion of a CP/NCD into another financial instrument
shall be reported by the issuer to the IPA and the Debenture Trustee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported by the issuer to the ipa and the debenture trustee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be between 9:00 am and 5:00 pm on a working day or as specified by the reserve bank from time to time
controls.control_description:
(k) Market timing
Primary issuance and secondary market trading hours shall be between 9:00 AM
and 5:00 PM on a working day or as specified by the Reserve Bank from time to
time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be between 9:00 am and 5:00 pm on a working day or as specified by the reserve bank from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow any standardised procedures and documentation which may be prescribed by fimmda, in consultation with the reserve bank, for smooth functioning
controls.control_description:
(l) Market Practices and Documentation
Participants / agencies in the CP and NCD markets shall follow any standardised
procedures and documentation which may be prescribed by FIMMDA, in
consultation with the Reserve Bank, for smooth functioning of the markets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow any standardised procedures and documentation which may be prescribed by fimmda, in consultation with the reserve bank, for smooth functioning

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported by the ipa on the f-trac platform by 5:30 pm on the day of issuance
controls.control_description:
(a) Primary issuances: Details of all issuances in primary markets of the CPs
and NCDs shall be reported by the IPA on the F-TRAC platform by 5:30 PM
on the day of issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported by the ipa on the f-trac platform by 5:30 pm on the day of issuance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported with time stamp within 15 minutes of execution (the time when price is agreed) on the f-trac platform by each counterparty to the transact
controls.control_description:
(b) Secondary market transactions: All secondary market transactions in CPs
and NCDs, executed in the OTC market and/or on the recognised stock
exchanges, shall be reported with time stamp within 15 minutes of execution
(the time when price is agreed) on the F-TRAC platform by each counterparty
to the transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported with time stamp within 15 minutes of execution (the time when price is agreed) on the f-trac platform by each counterparty to the transact

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported by the ipa on the f-trac platform by 5:30 pm on the buyback date
controls.control_description:
(c) Buybacks: Details of buybacks of CPs and NCDs shall be reported by the
IPA on the F-TRAC platform by 5:30 PM on the buyback date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported by the ipa on the f-trac platform by 5:30 pm on the buyback date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported by the ipa on the f-trac platform by 5:30 pm on the day of default or the day of repayment of defaulted obligations, as the case may be
controls.control_description:
(d) Default: Instances of default and repayment of defaulted obligation shall be
reported by the IPA on the F-TRAC platform by 5:30 PM on the day of default
or the day of repayment of defaulted obligations, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported by the ipa on the f-trac platform by 5:30 pm on the day of default or the day of repayment of defaulted obligations, as the case may be

controls.control_objective: To ensure report to the reserve bank, the details of the cps and ncds held with them in the dematerialised form, in the prescribed format furnished in annex ii
controls.control_description:
(e) Reporting by depositories: The depositories shall report to the Reserve
Bank, the details of the CPs and NCDs held with them in the dematerialised
form, in the prescribed format furnished in Annex II, at fortnightly intervals (on
the 15th day and on the last day of the month) or as and when called upon to
do so by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report to the reserve bank, the details of the cps and ncds held with them in the dematerialised form, in the prescribed format furnished in annex ii

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the details of the outstanding amount of ncds and the particulars of default in repayment of ncd, at quarterly intervals (within 15 days from t
controls.control_description:
(f) Reporting by Debenture Trustee: The Debenture Trustee shall report the
details of the outstanding amount of NCDs and the particulars of default in
repayment of NCD, at quarterly intervals (within 15 days from the end of the
quarter), in the format prescribed in Annex III to the Reserve Bank through e-
mail (reportfmd@rbi.org.in).
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the details of the outstanding amount of ncds and the particulars of default in repayment of ncd, at quarterly intervals (within 15 days from t

controls.control_objective: To ensure :
controls.control_description: (a) Issuing and Paying Agent: The IPA for an issuance shall:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to :

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in the event of an ipa violating any provision of these directions, or any other directions/ regulations/guidelines issued by the bank from time to
controls.control_description:
(vii) The Reserve Bank may, in the event of an IPA violating any provision of
these directions, or any other directions/ regulations/guidelines issued
by the Bank from time to time in this regard, disallow an entity from acting
as IPA for CP/NCD issuances for a period, as may be decided by the
Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , in the event of an ipa violating any provision of these directions, or any other directions/ regulations/guidelines issued by the bank from time to

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the securities and exchange board of india (debenture trustees) regulations, 1993, the provisions of companies act, 2013 related to deben
controls.control_description:
(i) The roles, responsibilities, duties and functions of the Debenture
Trustees shall be guided by the Securities and Exchange Board of India
(Debenture Trustees) Regulations, 1993, the provisions of Companies
Act, 2013 related to Debenture Trustees, as applicable, the trust deed
and the offer document.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the securities and exchange board of india (debenture trustees) regulations, 1993, the provisions of companies act, 2013 related to deben

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the reporting obligations specified in these directions are complied with
controls.control_description:
(ii) The Debenture Trustee shall ensure that the reporting obligations
specified in these Directions are complied with.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the reporting obligations specified in these directions are complied with

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit to the reserve bank any information regarding ncds, as may be required by the reserve bank from time to time
controls.control_description:
(iii) The Debenture Trustee shall submit to the Reserve Bank any
information regarding NCDs, as may be required by the Reserve Bank
from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit to the reserve bank any information regarding ncds, as may be required by the reserve bank from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in the event of a debenture trustee violating any provision of these directions, or any other directions/ regulations/guidelines issued by the bank
controls.control_description:
(iv) The Reserve Bank may, in the event of a Debenture Trustee violating
any provision of these directions, or any other directions/
regulations/guidelines issued by the Bank from time to time in this
regard, disallow an entity to act as Debenture Trustee for an NCD
issuance for a period, as may be decided by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , in the event of a debenture trustee violating any provision of these directions, or any other directions/ regulations/guidelines issued by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to rate cps and ncds
controls.control_description:
(i) A CRA registered with SEBI and accredited by the Reserve Bank as
External Credit Assessment Institution (ECAI) for assigning bank loan
ratings shall be eligible to rate CPs and NCDs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to rate cps and ncds

controls.control_objective: To ensure abide by the guidelines issued by sebi as applicable to securities mutatis mutandis for ratings of cps/ncds
controls.control_description:
(ii) CRAs shall abide by the guidelines issued by SEBI as applicable to
securities mutatis mutandis for ratings of CPs/NCDs.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to abide by the guidelines issued by sebi as applicable to securities mutatis mutandis for ratings of cps/ncds

controls.control_objective: To ensure also abide by any guidelines issued from time to time by the reserve bank in this regard
controls.control_description:
They shall also
abide by any guidelines issued from time to time by the Reserve Bank in
this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also abide by any guidelines issued from time to time by the reserve bank in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure such directions/regulations/guidelines do not conflict with these directions or any guidelines issued from time to time by the reserve bank in this re
controls.control_description:
(iii) CRAs may also abide by any directions/regulations/guidelines issued by
any regulator or other authority in respect of rating of CPs and NCDs
provided that such directions/regulations/guidelines do not conflict with
these Directions or any guidelines issued from time to time by the
Reserve Bank in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to such directions/regulations/guidelines do not conflict with these directions or any guidelines issued from time to time by the reserve bank in this re

controls.control_objective: To ensure no longer be eligible to rate cps/ ncds
controls.control_description:
(iv) A CRA which has been deregistered by SEBI or dis-accredited by the
Reserve Bank as an ECAI for assigning bank loans ratings, shall no
longer be eligible to rate CPs/ NCDs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to no longer be eligible to rate cps/ ncds

controls.control_objective: To ensure also, in the <image> event of a cra violating any provision of these directions, or any other guidelines issued by the bank from time to time in this
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank may also, in the
<image>
event of a CRA violating any provision of these directions, or any other
guidelines issued by the Bank from time to time in this regard, disallow
the CRA from rating CPs / NCDs for a period, as may be decided by the
Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also, in the <image> event of a cra violating any provision of these directions, or any other guidelines issued by the bank from time to time in this

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish such additional information and clarification within the time frame specified
controls.control_description:
Obligation to provide information sought by the Reserve Bank: The Reserve
Bank may call for any information or seek any clarification from any agency involved
in the CP and NCD markets, including but not limited to, issuers, investors, IPAs,
debenture trustees, CRAs, depositories, the clearing corporations and the stock
exchanges, which in the opinion of the Reserve Bank is relevant and the agency shall
furnish such additional information and clarification within the time frame specified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish such additional information and clarification within the time frame specified

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in public interest, publish any anonymised data related to primary and secondary market transactions in cps and ncds
controls.control_description:
Dissemination of data: The Reserve Bank or any other agency authorised by it,
may, in public interest, publish any anonymised data related to primary and secondary
market transactions in CPs and NCDs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in public interest, publish any anonymised data related to primary and secondary market transactions in cps and ncds

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in addition to taking any penal or regulatory action in accordance with law, disallow that person from participating in the cp and ncd markets for a
controls.control_description:
Violation of Directions: In the event of any person violating any provision of these
Directions, the Reserve Bank may, in addition to taking any penal or regulatory action
in accordance with law, disallow that person from participating in the CP and NCD
markets for a period not exceeding one month at a time, after providing reasonable
opportunity to the entity to defend its actions, and such action would be made public
by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in addition to taking any penal or regulatory action in accordance with law, disallow that person from participating in the cp and ncd markets for a

controls.control_objective: To ensure abide by the provisions of any direction, regulation, or guideline issued by any other regulator or authority, that may be applicable, in respect of issue of or investment in cps and ncds
controls.control_description:
Applicability of other laws, directions, regulations or guidelines: Participants
in the CP and NCD markets shall abide by the provisions of any direction, regulation,
or guideline issued by any other regulator or authority, that may be applicable, in
respect of issue of or investment in CPs and NCDs, provided that such directions,
regulations or guidelines do not conflict with these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to abide by the provisions of any direction, regulation, or guideline issued by any other regulator or authority, that may be applicable, in respect of issue of or investment in cps and ncds

controls.control_objective: To ensure prevail
controls.control_description:
In case of any conflicts,
the provisions of these Directions shall prevail.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prevail

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the raising of funds by issuance of cps, by any nbfc when such funds are raised in accordance with these directions
controls.control_description:
Non-applicability of Certain Other Directions: Nothing contained in the Master
Direction - Non-Banking Financial Companies Acceptance of Public Deposits
(Reserve Bank) Directions, 2016, as updated from time to time, shall apply to the
raising of funds by issuance of CPs, by any NBFC when such funds are raised in
accordance with these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the raising of funds by issuance of cps, by any nbfc when such funds are raised in accordance with these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to transactions in cps and ncds entered into from the date the directions come into effect
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall apply to transactions in CPs and NCDs entered into from
the date the Directions come into effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to transactions in cps and ncds entered into from the date the directions come into effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disclosed
controls.control_description:
If the issuer has not been in existence
for three years, the information of the issuer for the period such information is
available shall be disclosed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disclosed

controls.control_objective: To ensure affect the issue or the investor's decision to invest in the cp/ncd
controls.control_description:
Any material event/ development having implications for the financials/ credit
quality resulting in material liabilities, corporate restructuring event which may
affect the issue or the investor's decision to invest in the CP/NCD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to affect the issue or the investor's decision to invest in the cp/ncd

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose the residual maturity profile of its assets and liabilities in the following format: category up to >1 >2 >3 >6 months -1 year > 1 year - 3 y
controls.control_description:
An issuer which is either an NBFC or an HFC shall disclose the residual
maturity profile of its assets and liabilities in the following format:
Category Up to

controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose the residual maturity profile of its assets and liabilities in the following format: category up to >1 >2 >3 >6 months -1 year > 1 year - 3 y
